description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat, dark roof and a symmetrical facade. The front features two large, arched windows flanking a central door, all set within a red brick wall. Four street lamps line the paved walkway leading up to the entrance, adding a classic urban touch. The sides of the house are mostly solid with minimal window openings, and the rear is a plain brick wall. The roof appears to be made of a dark, possibly tarred material, and the structure is bordered by concrete or stone trim. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on durability and urban integration.
description: A two-story brick house with a flat dark roof, symmetrical arched windows, and a central entryway flanked by street lamps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two arched windows, four street lamps, and a paved walkway.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a mostly solid wall with minimal features and the continuation of the walkway and lamps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain brick wall with no windows or doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, with solid walls and visible street lamps and walkway.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with arched windows, flanked by four street lamps and a paved walkway, no porch or overhang.
